# family-address positive corpus — each line should trigger the detector
# Home address near family/child keyword
My home address is 123 Main Street and my children go to school nearby
We live at 456 Oak Avenue Apt 3B with our kids
My family home is 789 Elm Street — my son walks to school from there
Home: 234 Maple Drive and my daughter catches the bus here
Our family lives at 567 Pine Road where my children play
I live with my kids at 890 Cedar Lane — home address for records
My children's home address is 123 Birch Court neighborhood
Family residence at 456 Willow Way — my son attends school nearby
We reside at 789 Spruce Avenue with my daughter and son
Home address for my children: 234 Poplar Street district
My family home: 567 Chestnut Road — kids enrolled at local school
Residence: 890 Walnut Drive where my children live with me
Our home at 123 Hickory Lane — my daughter's school bus stop nearby
Family home address 456 Ash Street — two kids in elementary school
My son's home is 789 Magnolia Court — our residence for enrollment
Children reside at 234 Sycamore Place with family home
Home at 567 Mulberry Lane — my kids play in the yard here
Family address: 890 Dogwood Drive where my daughter lives
My children's residence: 123 Redbud Court family home
We live at 456 Sweetgum Avenue — home for my kids school records
